title: Trump Misstates Facts in Charlotte Refugee Case
summary: Trump incorrectly claimed a suspect in a Charlotte stabbing case came through open borders; the suspect was a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of factual accuracy in political statements, especially concerning immigration and crime.

title: Hayward Plant a Major Employer in Clemmons, NC
summary: Hayward, a swimming pool filter maker based in Charlotte, employs over 1,000 workers in Clemmons, NC.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the economic significance of manufacturing companies in smaller North Carolina towns.

title: Charlotte Trade Shows Focus on Brand Visibility
summary: Trade show exhibitors in Charlotte are using custom canopy tents to maximize brand visibility and ROI.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates how businesses are adapting marketing strategies to enhance their presence at trade events.

title: Mosaic Capital Partners Seeks VP in Charlotte
summary: Mosaic Capital Partners, a private equity firm in Charlotte, NC, is seeking a Vice President of Business Development.
charlotte_impact: Reflects growth and investment opportunities within the financial sector in Charlotte.

title: Florence Airport Passengers Increase, Loses Charlotte Flight
summary: Florence Regional Airport saw increased passenger traffic in 2025 but lost its American Airlines flight to Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Shows the fluctuating dynamics of regional air travel and the impact of airline route changes.

title: Women Charged in Torture, Death of Girl in Charlotte
summary: Three women in Charlotte, NC, are charged with torturing and killing a girl, keeping her in a dog crate.
charlotte_impact: Highlights a severe case of child abuse and the critical need for child protective services.

title: Warmer Weather Expected in North Carolina
summary: A warm-up is expected, with a record heat wave anticipated later this week and into next week.
charlotte_impact: Indicates a shift in weather patterns and the potential need for heat-related safety precautions.

title: Garry McFadden Wins Re-election Bid
summary: Garry McFadden wins re-election bid. "704 Unfiltered" featured the candidates running against Garry McFadden.
charlotte_impact: Shows the local political dynamics and the role of media in covering local elections.

title: Cooper, Whatley Secure Nominations in NC Senate Race
summary: Roy Cooper and Michael Whatley secure nominations in the North Carolina US Senate race.
charlotte_impact: Signals key candidates advancing in a significant national election, shaping the political landscape.

title: Rep. Alma Adams Wins Democratic Primary
summary: Rep. Alma Adams wins Democratic primary, Codiga wins Republican primary.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the results of primary elections and the candidates who will advance to the general election.

title: Key Races in NC District 11
summary: North Carolina's primary races are heating up as diverse candidates vie for positions in competitive districts.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the competitive nature of primary elections and the diversity of candidates involved.

title: Man Charged After Stabbing K-9 in Hickory
summary: Robert Lester, 35, is charged after stabbing a K-9 and being shot by Hickory police officers.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the dangers faced by law enforcement animals and the consequences of assaulting them.

title: Chemical Spill at Silfab Solar Plant in Fort Mill
summary: Operations held after a chemical spill at Silfab Solar plant in Fort Mill; investigation ongoing.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about environmental safety and the potential impact of industrial accidents on communities.

title: NC Prepares for Severe Weather Season
summary: North Carolina marks Severe Weather Preparedness Week as Daylight Saving Time begins.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the importance of preparedness and awareness during severe weather season.

title: Charlotte Leaders Outline 'Big Moves 2030'
summary: Charlotte officials mapped out the rapid deployment of "Big Moves 2030" at the annual City Council retreat.
charlotte_impact: Shows the city's focus on transportation infrastructure and future development plans.
